prompt:
A cleaned temperature plot displayed on a tablet or monitor, showing a smooth line with a faint rolling-average overlay and a few simple marker dots indicating highs and lows. Annotations are shown as minimalist arrows and circles without readable numbers or words, making the “trends pop” visually while keeping it textless; a small sensor probe and notebook sit nearby to imply this came from a logging setup.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future lab/desk setting: soft cinematic lighting, realistic screen reflections, no brand logos, and no readable UI labels. Keep the plot clean, uncluttered, and immediately recognizable as an annotated temperature graph.
